summary: Removed the instanced micro-geometry system (US-056): deleted microGeometry.ts, both shader files, and associated tests. Removed maxInstances from QualityProfile interface and all tier configs, the crystal+microgeometry compound mode, microgeometry from the mode rotation and system registry in main.ts, and the microgeometry case from extractSystemConfig/primaryCountForSystem. Updated all test files (including the 'visual 2' duplicates) to reflect reduced mode counts (3 compound modes, 7 system names, 5 single modes in relevant tests). Created removal verification test file with 20 tests. All 3031 tests pass (1 pre-existing build-path failure unrelated to changes).
